Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.cms.rest

Class DiscoveryPickerResource

java.lang.Object
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.cms.rest.DiscoveryPickerResource
@Path("/") @Produces("application/json") public class DiscoveryPickerResource extends Object
CMS JAX-RS endpoint used by the Discovery product picker Open UI extension.

Registered via DiscoveryPickerModule at address /discovery/picker, accessible from the CMS at {cmsContext}/ws/discovery/picker.

Endpoints:

  • GET /search — full-text product search
  • GET /items — look up specific products by PID
  • GET /categories — list browsable categories
  • GET /widgets — list available recommendation widgets

All configuration is read from the global Discovery config node at ConfigDefaults.CONFIG_NODE_PATH. API keys never leave the server.

    • DiscoveryPickerResource

      public DiscoveryPickerResource(Session moduleSession, DiscoveryConfigProvider configProvider, Function<String,String> httpGateway)

  • Method Details

    • search

      @GET @Path("/search") public PickerSearchResponseDto search(@QueryParam("channelId") @DefaultValue("") String channelId, @QueryParam("documentId") @DefaultValue("") String documentId, @QueryParam("q") @DefaultValue("*") String q, @QueryParam("page") @DefaultValue("0") int page, @QueryParam("pageSize") @DefaultValue("12") int pageSize, @QueryParam("catId") @DefaultValue("") String catId)

    • items

      @GET @Path("/items") public PickerSearchResponseDto items(@QueryParam("channelId") @DefaultValue("") String channelId, @QueryParam("documentId") @DefaultValue("") String documentId, @QueryParam("ids") String ids)
      Looks up specific products by PID. Used to reload already-selected items when an editor re-opens a document.
      Parameters:
      ids - comma-separated product IDs (PIDs)

    • listWidgets

      @GET @Path("/widgets") @Produces("application/json") public List<PickerWidgetDto> listWidgets(@QueryParam("channelId") @DefaultValue("") String channelId, @QueryParam("documentId") @DefaultValue("") String documentId)
      Returns recommendation widgets available for the channel.

    • browse

      @GET @Path("/browse") public PickerSearchResponseDto browse(@QueryParam("channelId") @DefaultValue("") String channelId, @QueryParam("documentId") @DefaultValue("") String documentId, @QueryParam("catId") @DefaultValue("") String catId, @QueryParam("page") @DefaultValue("0") int page, @QueryParam("pageSize") @DefaultValue("9") int pageSize)
      Browses products within a specific category.

      Uses search_type=category&q={catId} against the core API so the Discovery engine returns products ranked by category relevance.

    • categoryProducts

      @GET @Path("/category-products") public List<PickerItemDto> categoryProducts(@QueryParam("documentId") @DefaultValue("") String documentId, @QueryParam("categoryId") @DefaultValue("") String categoryId, @QueryParam("count") @DefaultValue("4") int count, @QueryParam("channelId") @DefaultValue("") String channelId)
      Returns a thumbnail preview of products in a category document.

      Reads brxdis:categoryId from the document node identified by documentId, then issues a category browse with rows=count and returns the items list.

    • categories

      @GET @Path("/categories") public List<PickerCategoryDto> categories(@QueryParam("channelId") @DefaultValue("") String channelId, @QueryParam("documentId") @DefaultValue("") String documentId)
      Returns browsable categories for the channel.

      Uses search_type=category&rows=0 against the core API so only the category_map is returned — no product rows are fetched.
